title: Rebuilds Angel Children Numbering
wikitext:
[]: Rebuild's Angel/Children Numbering?             Quote Post by skikes » Sun Jan 03, 2010 6:18 pm I was wondering about the numbering of angels and children in rebuild. I can't seem to find the information online if infact it is even mentioned in rebuild, i don't recall. Anyone clear this up for me?

[]:             Quote Post by Ironfoot » Sun Jan 03, 2010 6:27 pm http://wiki.evageeks.org/Angel Right hand column. The children in Rebuild are not numbered AFAIK.

[]:             Quote Post by skikes » Sun Jan 03, 2010 6:31 pm oh that's new.... thought that about the children. thanks. ...still no names for the new angels yet huh...

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jan 03, 2010 7:28 pm The Angels are numbered but not named. Sachiel is called the 4th Angel and they just go up from there with the exception of the 3rd Angel which is one of the new ones. The Children are named/numbered as follows: First Girl (Rei), Second Girl (Asuka), Third Boy (Shinji). Yes, the gender and number scheme are in Japanese instead of English. And so far none of the other pilots are given a number/gender designation. Hope that helps.

[]:             Quote Post by skikes » Sun Jan 03, 2010 9:01 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: The Angels are numbered but not named. Sachiel is called the 4th Angel and they just go up from there with the exception of the 3rd Angel which is one of the new ones. The Children are named/numbered as follows: First Girl (Rei), Second Girl (Asuka), Third Boy (Shinji). Yes, the gender and number scheme are in Japanese instead of English. And so far none of the other pilots are given a number/gender designation. Hope that helps.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Mon Jan 04, 2010 12:18 am Or it's just stupid Engrish shit again, just like when "Children" was used as a singular noun.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Mon Jan 04, 2010 11:54 am unless kaworu is the first boy and theres one more male pilot we dont know of. I think i prophesied Gendo becoming a pilot before

[]:             Quote Post by jayngfet » Mon Jan 04, 2010 7:23 pm There being a second boy does makek a bit of sense. We know 08 will appear and 07 we know nothing of. Two new units that need pilots and unit two was filled in and trained long before Shinji came around.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Jan 04, 2010 7:44 pm Er, it's always possible that one of the other pilots like Mari or Asuka or Shinji could pilot Eva-07 or 08, especially considering some of the theories involving Eva-08. There doesn't need to be a new pilot that way, though it's hard to say at this point.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Mon Jan 04, 2010 9:54 pm dont take my statement too literally jayngfet ^^
